case_title: CAVALRY PORTFOLIO SERVICES, LLC AS ASSIGNEE OF VS. KELVIN CHIN et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY PORTFOLIO SERVICES, LLC AS ASSIGNEE OF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC AS ASSIGNEE OF BANK OFAMERICA/FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT CHIN, KELVIN DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-05-2011

RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY PORTFOLIO SERVICES, LLC AS ASSIGNEE OF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC AS ASSIGNEE OF BANK OFAMERICA/FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT CHIN, KELVIN
DECLARATION RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY PORTFOLIO SERVICES, LLC AS ASSIGNEE OF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC AS ASSIGNEE OF BANK OFAMERICA/FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY PORTFOLIO SERVICES, LLC AS ASSIGNEE OF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC AS ASSIGNEE OF BANK OFAMERICA/FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A. SERVED JAN-13-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHIN, KELVIN

STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY PORTFOLIO SERVICES, LLC AS ASSIGNEE OF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC AS ASSIGNEE OF BANK OFAMERICA/FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A. ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT CHIN, KELVIN

STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED; THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAVALRY PORTFOLIO SERVICES, LLC AS ASSIGNEE OF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC AS ASSIGNEE OF BANK OFAMERICA/FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHIN, KELVIN $4,310.67 PRINCIPAL, $300.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $781.49 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, $148.00 CREDIT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,469.16, ENFORCEMENT OF JUDGMENT STAYED, PROVIDED DEFENDANT PAYS THE JUDGMENT AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT IS TO PAY CONSECUTIVE MONTHLY PAYMENTS OF $148.00 EACH, COMMENCING JANUARY 30, 2011, AND CONTINUING ON THE SAME DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER UNTIL THE AMOUNT OWED ON THE JUDGMENT IS PAID IN FULL. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY PORTFOLIO SERVICES, LLC AS ASSIGNEE OF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC AS ASSIGNEE OF BANK OFAMERICA/FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT CHIN, KELVIN
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE
